response.step_by_step_log: The video features a performance of the song "Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore" (2012 Version), as indicated by the on-screen text. I identified the primary performers as Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Shirogane Noel. The original song is from the Neon Genesis Evangelion franchise. I performed a search using the query "Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore Japanese and English lyrics" to obtain the necessary lyric data.
response.global_summary: A live performance of the song "Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore" (2012 Version) by VTubers Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, and Shirogane Noel, featuring dance choreography throughout the video.

scenes.description: The four VTubers (Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel) perform the song "Kokoro yo Genshi ni Modore" with dance routines on a concert stage.
scenes.performer_in_video: Usada Pekora, Houshou Marine, Shiranui Flare, Shirogane Noel
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
光よ... 大地よ... 気流よ...
悲しい日々が 化石に変わるよ もうすぐ
あなたのその痛みを 眠りの森へと
ひそやかにみちびいてあげる
おやすみ すべてに 一途すぎた迷い子たち
はがゆさが希望に 進化する日まで...
(いつか時代の夜が明ける)
世界よ まぶたを閉じて
(生命は目覚めて 時を紡ぎだす)
花びらが 風に揺れて落ちるように
生命はただ はかなくて
Ah, 大地へと 消えてゆく
悲しみは とぎれた未来ではなく
思い出の...
心よ 原始に戻れ
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Light! Earth! Flowing air!
Those sad days will soon turn into fossils
And your pain will be secretly led to the forest of sleep
Goodnight, the lost children who were too earnest in everything
Until the day your impatience evolves into a dream
(Someday the darkness of this era will break into dawn)
World! Close your eyes
(Life is awakening, weaving time itself)
Like as petals sway and fall in the wind
Life is simply ephemeral
Ah, vanishing into the earth
Sadness is not in the broken future
But in the open sea of memories
Heart! Return to your origin!
